agents.name: Name
agents.modelHint: The LLM model used for this agent

settings.title: Agent Settings
settings.description: Configure agent basic info and model parameters
settings.toolCallWarningTitle: Current model may not support tool calls
settings.toolCallWarningDescription: Tools are enabled, but the selected model may not support function calling. Consider selecting a model that supports tool calls.
settings.modelParamsHint: Temperature, Top P, Max Tokens are configured in the model settings
settings.maxIterationsTooltip: Maximum number of iterations the agent can perform when using tools. Each tool call counts as one iteration.

agents.deleteAgentConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
agents.createAgentHint: Create your first AI assistant to get started
agents.systemPromptPlaceholder: Enter system prompt to define the agent's behavior...
agents.temperatureHint: Controls randomness. Lower values are more deterministic.
agents.maxTokensHint: Maximum tokens in response. Leave empty for model default.
agents.openingMessagePlaceholder: Message displayed when starting a new conversation
agents.suggestedQuestionsHint: Questions displayed to help users get started
agents.knowledgeBasesHint: Connect knowledge bases for RAG retrieval
agents.toolsHint: Enable tools for the agent to use
agents.variablesHint: Define input variables for the system prompt
agents.deleteConversationConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.tooltip: Define the agent's role, behavior, and response style
prompt.placeholder:
Write your prompt here...

Example: You are a professional customer service assistant responsible for answering questions about products. You should:
- Reply in a friendly, professional tone
- Suggest contacting human support for uncertain questions
- Use emoji appropriately to make conversations friendlier

variables.title: Variables
variables.tooltip: Variables allow user input forms to be injected into prompts or opening messages
variables.empty: No variables yet. After adding, you can reference them in prompts using '{{variableName}}'.

knowledgeBase.title: Knowledge Base
knowledgeBase.tooltip: Connect knowledge bases for RAG retrieval
knowledgeBase.empty: No knowledge bases linked. Once linked, the agent can retrieve content from knowledge bases to answer questions.
knowledgeBase.noAvailable: No knowledge bases available to add

dialog.topKHint: Number of most relevant chunks to retrieve
dialog.thresholdHint: Only return results above this similarity score

tools.title: Tools
tools.tooltip: Enable tools the agent can call
tools.empty: No tools added. Add tools to let the agent perform specific tasks.
tools.toolNotFound: Tool not found or has been deleted

vision.title: Vision
vision.tooltip: Enable vision capabilities to understand and analyze images
vision.description: When enabled, the agent can receive and understand image inputs. Requires a vision-capable model (e.g., GPT-4V, Claude 3).

fileUpload.title: File Upload
fileUpload.tooltip: Enable users to upload documents for the agent to analyze
fileUpload.description: When enabled, users can upload documents (PDF, Word, Excel, PPT, etc.). The content will be parsed and injected into the prompt.
fileUpload.parserHint: Select a tool to parse uploaded files. You can also create custom file parsing tools.
fileUpload.variableHint: Use the following variable in your prompt to inject file content:
fileUpload.supportedFormats: Supported formats: PDF, Word (.docx/.doc), Excel (.xlsx/.xls), PowerPoint (.pptx/.ppt), text files (.txt/.md/.csv/.json/.html/.xml)

preview.title: Debug & Preview
preview.empty: Start a conversation to test your Agent
preview.mockResponse: This is a preview message. Actual functionality requires configuring a model.

logs.title: Logs
logs.description: Logs record the application's activity, including user inputs and AI responses.
logs.selectConversation: Select a conversation to view details
logs.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation? This action cannot be undone and all messages will be permanently deleted.

apiAccess.title: API Access
apiAccess.description: Integrate this Agent into your applications via API
apiAccess.draftWarningDescription: This Agent is currently in draft status. API calls may not work properly. Please publish the Agent first.
apiAccess.endpointDescription: Send messages using POST requests and receive streaming responses.
apiAccess.authDescription: Use Bearer Token authentication in the request header. You can create and manage API keys in settings.

params.conversationId: Conversation ID for multi-turn dialogue. Leave empty (null) for first message, the response will return a conversation_id in the message_start event. Use this ID in subsequent requests to continue the conversation with context.

apiAccess.sseDescription: Responses are streamed using Server-Sent Events (SSE) format. Here are the possible event types:

events.messageStart: Message started, contains conversation_id and message_id
events.ragContext: RAG retrieval results with relevant documents
events.toolCall: Tool call with tool name and arguments
events.messageEnd: Message ended with token usage statistics

multiTurn.title: Multi-turn Conversation
multiTurn.description: To maintain conversation context across multiple requests, use the conversation_id returned in the first response.
multiTurn.step1Description: Send the first message with conversation_id set to null to create a new conversation:
multiTurn.step2Description: The message_start event in the response will contain the conversation_id:
multiTurn.step3Description: Use the returned conversation_id in subsequent requests to continue the conversation with context:

apiAccess.variablesDescription: This Agent has the following variables defined. You need to provide values for them in your requests:

monitor.title: Monitor
monitor.description: View usage statistics and performance metrics for this Agent

charts.conversationTrendDesc: Number of conversations and messages over time
